case_title: HILDA M TURCIOS VS. YULY VILDERMAN, PROFESSIONAL DENTAL CORP.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) NATALIE BARELI, OFFICE MANAGER. FILED BY DEFENDANT YULY VILDERMAN, PROFESSIONAL DENTAL CORP. DBA METRO DENTAL GROUP

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY TURCIOS, HILDA M AS TO DEFENDANT YULY VILDERMAN, PROFESSIONAL DENTAL CORP. DBA METRO DENTAL GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2022 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2022 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO AUG-15-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HILDA M. TURCIOS IS PRESENT. REYMUNDO PORTILLO, HUSBAND ASSISTS PLAINTIFF WITH SPANISH TO ENGLISH INTERPERTATION OF THE CONTINUANCE DATE. DEFENDANT YULY VILDERMAN, PROFESSIONAL DENTAL CORP. REPRESENTED BY NATALIE BARELI, OFFICE MANAGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICES. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506) (FILE RETAINED IN D.506)
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 **ADDING AGENT FOR SERVICE** FILED BY TURCIOS, HILDA M AS TO DEFENDANT YULY VILDERMAN, PROFESSIONAL DENTAL CORP. DBA METRO DENTAL GROUP

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TURCIOS, HILDA M ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR SPANISH INTERPTER.
DECLARATION RE: AGENT FOR SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TURCIOS, HILDA M
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. FILED BY TURCIOS, HILDA M YULY VILDERMAN, PROFESSIONAL DENTAL CORP. DBA METRO DENTAL GROUP

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-15-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-15-2022 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF HILDA M TURCIOS IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH COURT INTERPRETER PATRICE BINAISA. REYMUNDO PORTILLO (HUSBAND) IS ALSO PRESENT TO ASSIST THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT YULY VILDERMAN, PROFESSIONAL DENTAL CORP IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY NATALIE BAREL (OFFICE MANAGER). MR. VILDERMAN PRIMARY LANGUAGE IS RUSSIAN. PARTIES STIPULATED FOR THE MATTER TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: A. DATT / D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TURCIOS, HILDA M IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YULY VILDERMAN, PROFESSIONAL DENTAL CORP. DBA METRO DENTAL GROUP PARTIES SIGNED AN ARBITRATION AGREEMENT ON JULY 22, 2021, SO PARTY MUST GO THROUGH THIS PROCESS. THE ARBITRATION AGREEMENT WAS BOTH IN SPANISH - ENGLISH WITH ENGLISH VERSION SIGNED BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
